ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight ABC123
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Thank you for choosing AirIndia for your upcoming travel. We are pleased to confirm your booking details below:

Flight: ABC123
Date: 28th Apr 2026
Departure: New Delhi (DEL) at 10:15 AM
Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) at 12:45 PM
Seat: 12B
Class: Economy

Booking Reference: AI2026-ABC123
Ticket Number: 1234567890

Please arrive at the departure gate at least 90 minutes before the scheduled departure time. You can check-in online up to 24 hours before the flight via our official app or website. Remember to carry a valid ID proof and a printed or digital boarding pass.

If you have any questions or need to make changes to your itinerary, feel free to contact our customer support at +91-22-1234-5678 or email support@airindia.com.

Bon Voyage!

Best Regards,
AirIndia Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Schedule Your Zoom Meeting
spam.body:
Hello Team,

As a part of our upcoming project rollout, I need everyone to join a mandatory Zoom session tomorrow at 02:00 PM IST. This meeting is crucial for aligning our deliverables and ensuring compliance with the new client guidelines.

Please use the link below to join the meeting. Do not share the link with anyone else as it contains sensitive project information.

<URL>

The meeting will last approximately 90 minutes. Kindly confirm your attendance by replying to this email at your earliest convenience. If you encounter any technical issues or have conflicts with the schedule, please notify me immediately so we can make alternate arrangements.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Best,
Ravi Patel
Project Lead, XYZ Solutions
